response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years in the industry, demonstrating strong alignment with the core stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He possesses a deep background in test-driven development, cloud infrastructure, and notably, direct experience with AI agent development (MCP), making him an exceptional fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization (AWS, Kubernetes).
Direct, recent experience in AI agent development and Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure.
Strong engineering fundamentals with a heavy emphasis on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, though his general Node.js and testing expertise mitigates this.
Has spent considerable time working with DLang, which is not directly relevant to the company's tech stack.
History of managing side projects and a startup (GISCollective) concurrently with full-time roles, which might require a bandwidth check.
